title: campanula glomerata var. farinosa
intro: Campanula glomerata var. farinosa, also known as the clustered bellflower, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the bellflower family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Campanula glomerata var. farinosa include its ability to soothe irritated mucous membranes, reduce congestion, and help alleviate symptoms associated with colds and flu. The herbal preparation of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
